Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0880 "EREBUS-0400-0880" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Erebus (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. The loading screen was moved from $2000 to $C000, as the original loader overwrote it during the loading process. The screen RAM was also moved from $0400 to $E000 so as to be in the same VICII bank.
